name: Cacophony
bio: Cacophony was an American speed metal band formed in 1986 in San Francisco, California. The group was founded by guitarists Marty Friedman and Jason Becker, two of the most technically gifted players of the era. Known for their blazing neoclassical guitar work and complex compositions, the band released two studio albums before disbanding in 1989. Their music remains highly influential in the world of shred and metal guitar.
